edits.contents:
@adw-903
Feature: issue 903 behavioural contract

  @adw-903
  Scenario: orchestrator records state after completing plan phase
    Given the mock GitHub API is configured to accept issue comments
    And no spawn lock exists for issue 903
    When the "sdlc" orchestrator is invoked with adwId "sw-506-3" and issue 903
    Then the state file for adwId "sw-506-3" records workflowStage "awaiting_merge"
    And the mock GitHub API recorded a comment on issue 903
